tasks_completed.name: Brainstorm results session 6
tasks_completed.key_finding: Authorised three morphology sweep tasks (t0029 distal-length, t0030 distal-diameter, t0031 paywalled Kim2014/Sivyer2013 fetch) targeting S-0027-01/03/06; backlog left unchanged at 110 uncovered suggestions

tasks_completed.name: Distal-dendrite length sweep on t0022 DSGC
tasks_completed.key_finding: Primary DSI pinned at 1.000 across all 7 multipliers (0.5x-2.0x, 840 trials, ~42 min); vector-sum DSI fallback shifts only 0.664 -> 0.643; cannot discriminate Dan2018 passive-TR from Sivyer2013 dendritic-spike because null firing is 0 Hz everywhere

tasks_completed.name: Distal-dendrite diameter sweep on t0022 DSGC
tasks_completed.key_finding: Vector-sum DSI slope 0.0083 per log2(multiplier), p=0.1773 (flat) across 4x diameter range; neither Schachter2010 active-dendrite amplification nor passive-filtering supported; 840 trials in ~115 min

tasks_completed.name: Brainstorm results session 7
tasks_completed.key_finding: Opened a parallel planning thread while t0029 ran; commissioned t0033 as a corpus-only planner for a future joint morphology + top-10 VGC DSI-maximisation optimisation anchored on Vast.ai GPU pricing

tasks_completed.name: Plan DSGC morphology + VGC DSI optimisation; estimate Vast.ai GPU budget
tasks_completed.key_finding: Recommended Surrogate-NN-GA on RTX 4090 with tight 25-param parameterisation at central $50.54 (sensitivity $23-$119); training cost $41.56 dominates inference $8.98; 6 follow-up suggestions queued covering CoreNEURON benchmark, AIS/axon hooks, multi-fidelity surrogate, transfer-learning warm-start, CMA-ES/BO spike, and reusable DSI-objective library

tasks_created.name: Plan DSGC morphology + VGC DSI optimisation; estimate Vast.ai GPU budget
tasks_created.reason: Authorised by brainstorm session 7 as a corpus-only planner and cost-estimator for a future joint morphology + top-10 VGC optimiser on Vast.ai GPU

key_findings: t0029 distal-length sweep on t0022 pins primary DSI at 1.000 across all 7 multipliers (0.5x-2.0x, 840 trials); vector-sum DSI shifts only 0.021 absolute

t0030 distal-diameter sweep on t0022 produces vector-sum DSI slope 0.0083 per log2(mult), p=0.1773 - flat across 4x diameter range; neither Schachter2010 active amplification nor passive filtering is supported

Both t0029 and t0030 null-firing is 0 Hz on every one of 1,680 sweep trials - the E-I schedule (GABA_CONDUCTANCE_NULL_NS = 12 nS, 2x Schachter2010 compound inhibition) drives null firing to zero before cable mechanics act
t0033 recommended Surrogate-NN-GA on RTX 4090 with tight 25-parameter setup at central $50.54 (sensitivity $23-$119); training cost $41.56 dominates inference $8.98
t0033 identified multi-fidelity surrogates and transfer-learning warm-start from existing t0022/t0024/t0026 data as highest-leverage cost reductions (pulling central cell to ~$30)
t0031 paywalled-PDF fetch remained not-started; research loop prioritised morphology sweeps and Vast.ai planner ahead of the fetch
